rejections.finding: last_mile_test: auth_flow — Auth URL returns 404 Not Found
rejections.reason: last_mile_test was testing https://mint.minibits.cash/Bitcoin as a web UI, but this is a Cashu NUT-06 REST API endpoint, not an HTML application. cashu-l402 is a library/middleware — not a web UI. All 8 last_mile_test failures share the same root cause and are not actionable for the codebase.

rejections.finding: last_mile_test: page_loads — Main URL returns HTTP 404 JSON
rejections.reason: Same as above — third-party API endpoint tested as web UI.

rejections.finding: last_mile_test: console_errors — Cannot verify JS health
rejections.reason: Same root cause as page_loads failure.
REST API has no responsive layout to test.

rejections.finding: last_mile_test: navigation_works — No nav elements found
rejections.reason: REST API has no navigation elements.

rejections.finding: last_mile_test: forms_work — No form elements found
last_mile_test: images_load — No image elements found

rejections.reason: REST API performance cannot be measured via web page load.

rejections.finding: gap_analyzer + feature_audit + researcher: project is empty/greenfield
rejections.reason: Stale findings from when the project had no code. Tasks 001-006 are now completed and verified with 100% verification score. Fully superseded.

deferrals.finding: security_audit medium: Non-persistent token registry — replay risk on restart/multi-instance (CWE-362)
deferrals.reason: Architectural concern requiring external infrastructure (Redis/PostgreSQL). Cannot be fixed in a single code task. Cashu mint's own double-spend prevention is the authoritative check.

deferrals.finding: security_audit low: Default CASHU_MINT_URL points to third-party public mint (CWE-1104)
deferrals.reason: Deployment/ops concern. Task 008 already forces HTTPS validation. The default URL is a configuration decision.

deferrals.finding: security_audit low: Dependency version pinning — caret ranges in package.json (CWE-1357)
deferrals.reason: Low priority ops/CI process concern, not a code defect.

deferrals.finding: security_audit low: No structured audit logging (CWE-778)
deferrals.reason: Enhancement, not blocking production readiness compared to critical/high findings.

accepted_findings.finding: Hardcoded fallback secret + optional secret type (CWE-798 + CWE-330)
REQUIRED_SATS not validated as positive integer (CWE-20)
Incomplete URL normalization for trusted mint checks (CWE-183)

project_declared.note: Tasks 001-006 in active/ are all status:completed and verified. No pending project-declared tasks. No OVERNIGHT_TASKS.md found.
